name: cc-chief
description: cc-chief — the top brain of the cc-* harness: the `/chief` skill orchestrates the workers (second pilots) across a product's sub-projects (a backend, a frontend, a service… each a git repo under the current folder). Flexible like the worker but a level up, it holds two responsibilities: (1) keep each sub-project's roadmap true (through that repo's /planner-brainstorm) and own the product North Star, and (2) orchestrate the workers — reason about how the sub-projects fit together, sequence cross-repo work provider-first, and dispatch workers as native subagents (the cc-worker `worker` agent) selectively, never one-per-repo. It conducts; the workers think and build. Depends on cc-worker.
